articles.title: SpaceX, Anthropic, and OpenAI’s hot IPO summer
articles.description: The IPO market is back, and it’s not the same companies leading the charge. FAANG had a good run, but a new acronym is taking over: MANGOS — Meta (or Microsoft, depending on who you ask), Anthropic, Nvidia, Google, OpenAI, and SpaceX. Half of that bunch is heading to public markets in the same window, and it’s a stress test for investors, for valuations, and for […]

articles.title: Elon Musk becomes the world’s first trillionaire after SpaceX’s historic IPO
articles.description: The SpaceX IPO has boosted Musk's paper wealth to more than $1,000,000,000,000 at a time when he is more hated -- and powerful -- than ever.

articles.title: SpaceX opens at $150, an 11% pop for the most anticipated debut in history
articles.description: The company made its heavily anticipated debut on Friday, trading higher than its initial $135 IPO price.

articles.title: SpaceX IPO: Everything you need to know
articles.description: TechCrunch has followed SpaceX's start, struggles, and successes from the early days. And we're here for what happens next too. This package of SpaceX IPO coverage includes who stands to win (and maybe some who won't), pre-IPO deals, and what's tucked inside its S-1 registration document.

articles.title: US surveillance law to expire for first time after lawmakers reject Trump’s controversial pick to lead spy agencies
articles.description: The spy law known as Section 702, which authorizes the NSA and FBI's warrantless surveillance, will all but certainly expire on Friday for the first time.

articles.title: Cheaper, faster, and culturally aware, Avataar’s video AI is built for India’s scale
articles.description: Avataar AI's distilled video model is priced at $0.005 for every second of generation.

articles.title: Equal AI raises $30M to screen calls so Indians don’t have to
articles.description: Equal AI said that its AI-powered call assistant now has over a million monthly active users.

articles.title: Theker just raised $85M to build the factory robot that doesn’t specialize in anything
articles.description: Unlike humanoid robots designed around a fixed form — think Boston Dynamics — Theker's machines are built to be reconfigured.

articles.title: Jeff Bezos’s Prometheus raises $12B to build an ‘artificial general engineer’ for the physical world
articles.description: The new round values the physical AI startup that aims to automate heavy engineering and drug design at $41 billion.

articles.title: SpaceX officially prices shares at $135 in the largest IPO ever
articles.description: Wits its official share pricing announcement, SpaceX's IPO has begun.

articles.title: Oracle warns of security bug that hackers abused to breach 100+ companies
articles.description: The tech giant warned of a security flaw that a cybercrime gang said it's exploiting as part of a mass-hacking campaign. Google said it notified more than 100 organizations that had potentially vulnerable servers.

articles.title: SpaceX SPV investors won’t know their true holdings until post-IPO lock-ups lift
articles.description: After SpaceX makes its public debut, lower-tier SPV investors face hidden fees, lengthy payout delays, and the risk of outright fraud.

articles.title: Bluesky launches group chats, as company shifts focus to community features
articles.description: Bluesky's latest feature is group chats, arriving amid a shift in focus on building features for smaller communities.

articles.title: Meta’s Edits app is getting an AI assistant and a desktop version
articles.description: By integrating an AI assistant directly into Edits, Meta is aiming to keep creators engaged on Instagram as it continues to compete with TikTok and YouTube for creators' attention.

articles.title: Coinbase’s new tool can help agents trade and pay for premium research
articles.description: Coinbase's agent can use x402 protocol to get access to data and APIs.

articles.title: Quantum Space’s military SPAC is trying to catch SpaceX’s IPO wave
articles.description: Quantum Space says SPACs aren't dead as it seeks a $1.2 billion deal to build military spacecraft.

articles.title: Deezer’s new tool can identify AI music from Spotify, Apple Music, and others
articles.description: Deezer introduced a tool that scans playlists from Spotify, Apple Music, and other platforms to identify AI music.

articles.title: These are the countries moving to ban social media for children
articles.description: Australia was the first country to issue a ban in late 2025, aiming to reduce the pressures and risks that young users may face on social media, including cyberbullying, social media addiction, and exposure to predators.

articles.title: Waymo launches a loyalty program with 10% cash back and free cancellations
articles.description: Members of the program, called "Waymo Premier," will have to pony up $29.99 per month.

articles.title: Pool’s new app turns your screenshots into something useful
articles.description: Pool's new app automatically sorts screenshots into personalized collections, tracks down the original links behind saved content, and helps you rediscover products, recipes, travel ideas, and other things you meant to revisit.

articles.description: This World Cup, refs will use digital twins of each player to view plays from every angle.

articles.description: Outbreak responses are still playing catch-up as US works to isolate itself.

tech.summary:
今日科技动态摘要

1. **SpaceX IPO成为市场焦点**：SpaceX以每股135美元的价格完成史上最大规模IPO，首日开盘价150美元，涨幅达11%，并推动埃隆·马斯克成为全球首位万亿富翁。此外，SPV投资者需等待锁定期结束后才能明确持股情况。

2. **AI领域融资与产品密集发布**：Jeff Bezos旗下Prometheus获120亿美元融资，旨在打造“通用人工智能工程师”；Equal AI融资3000万美元，开发印度来电筛选系统；Avataar推出针对印度市场的低成本、快响应视频AI；Meta的Edits应用新增AI助手及桌面版。

3. **科技监管与安全事件**：美国监控法首次在国会否决特朗普提名的间谍机构负责人后到期失效；Oracle披露安全漏洞，已被黑客利用导致超100家公司遭入侵。

4. **新兴平台与工具动态**：Bluesky推出群聊功能，转向社区化发展；Coinbase推出新工具，支持代理进行交易及付费获取高级研究。

5. **工业机器人创新**：Theker完成8500万美元融资，研发不局限于特定任务的通用型工厂机器人。

**今日最值得关注的发展**：SpaceX的史诗级IPO不仅刷新资本市场纪录，更标志着商业航天与AI驱动的“万亿富翁时代”正式开启。

ai.summary:
今日AI动态摘要

1. **模型开发与评估工具**：Hugging Face发布“olmo-eval”评估工作台，用于模型开发循环中的性能测试；同时推出“North Mini Code”模型，为开发者提供轻量级代码生成工具。
2. **技术优化与集成**：PyTorch推出“从nn.Linear到融合MLP”的性能分析教程；OpenAI宣布收购Ona，并支持BBVA银行将AI嵌入核心业务，以及通过Oracle云服务提供模型访问。
3. **开源与社区生态**：开源社区支持“OpenEnv”用于智能体强化学习；Hugging Face展示通过链式调用两个Space构建3D巴黎画廊的智能体案例，并推出GitHub CI迁移至HF Jobs的功能。
4. **AI应用与行业落地**：Preply结合AI与人类导师实现个性化学习；天体物理学家用Codex模拟黑洞；LSEG（伦敦证券交易所集团）扩展可信AI决策框架。
5. **政策与安全关注**：OpenAI支持欧洲构建可信AI生态系统；谷歌在弗吉尼亚州投资社区能源项目；报告指出与中国关联的影响行动正试图干预美国AI辩论。

**今日最值得关注的发展**：Hugging Face与OpenAI密集推出模型开发工具、行业落地案例及安全治理举措，凸显AI技术正从基础研究加速向开发者生态、金融与能源等关键行业渗透。

cctv.summary:
今日新闻联播动态摘要

1. **科技与AI发展**：中国加速在光子学、芯片设计软件及人工智能领域的布局，计划投入2950亿美元建设全国AI数据中心，并推出性能远超ChatGPT的AI模型（如小米MiMo），同时面临美国芯片限制下的自主创新挑战。
2. **医疗与汽车产业**：中国以先进且低成本的医疗服务吸引海外患者；比亚迪提出五年内成为全球最大汽车制造商的目标，展现中国制造业竞争力。
3. **国际关系与地缘政治**：中方专家批评菲律宾外长关于日菲海洋划界“与中国无关”的言论，指出此举暗藏超越双边谈判的别有用心；中国重新调整对朝关系，应对核问题沉默下的地区平衡变化。
4. **能源与基础设施**：中国选择发展大型核反应堆，并大规模投资AI数据中心建设，推动能源与数字基础设施协同升级。
5. **中美竞争与数据安全**：中美在AI领域的系统性竞争持续深化，有报道称中国关联方曾利用ChatGPT影响数据中心辩论，凸显技术博弈中的信息战风险。

今日最值得关注的发展：中国以2950亿美元空前规模投入AI基础设施建设，并在光子芯片、AI模型性能上实现突破，显示在科技自主与全球竞争中正采取“投资+创新”双轮驱动战略。
